---
name: data-parsing
description: "Use when: parsing, transforming, or validating structured data (JSON, XML, CSV, tabular, or custom formats), map rendering, or coordinate conversion. Covers data extraction, schema validation, coordinate math, and map visualization."
---

# Data Parsing, Map Rendering, and Coordinate Conversion Skill

**Use for:**
- Parsing and validating API responses (JSON, XML, CSV, tabular)
- Transforming data between formats
- Extracting or converting map coordinates (sector/hex, world-space, map-space)
- Rendering or visualizing map data
- Schema validation and error diagnosis

**Not for:**
- General graphics/UI (use graphics skill)
- Non-map data (use appropriate domain skill)
